MINI MINUTES:

Ryan L. Dahm, of Cook Collection Attorneys, PLC, Tel. 415.989.4730, for plaintiffs;

Ruling: The matter was not argued. Plaintiff Trimark ERF, Inc., Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining order, and Turnover Order is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed.
